---
title: 'number of players in the lobby is not display from the tasting list page of a host.'
---

# Context

As a host when I create a tasting and share the link to 3 participants and the 3 participants are waiting in the lobby
AND as a host I can "see" them from this page
<https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/host?code=7498&id=ROBUST-TANNIN>
AND from the tasting list page <https://sommelier-arena.ducatillon.net/host>

# Actual

Then 2 players is displayed for the tasting from the tasting list page of the host.

# Expected

Then 3 players is displayed for the tasting from the tasting list page of the host.

👉 Note : Not sure if this is a bug issue or a partykit issue because if 2 more particpants join then the number of players is correct (5)
